title: James back with Minnesota after hospitalization
summary: Colombian star James Rodríguez, who was hospitalized last week for severe dehydration, returned to his MLS club Minnesota United FC on Monday to continue his ramp-up to game readiness.
content: Colombian star James Rodríguez, who was hospitalized last week for severe dehydration, returned to his MLS club Minnesota United FC on Monday to continue his ramp-up to game readiness.

zh.title: 詹姆斯住院后回归明尼苏达
zh.summary: 哥伦比亚球星詹姆斯·罗德里格斯因严重脱水上周住院，周一回到他的美职联俱乐部明尼苏达联队，继续为复出比赛做准备。

title: Arteta preaches calm ahead of Sporting quarterfinal
summary: Mikel Arteta has urged Arsenal's players not to panic as they aim to get their season back on track against Sporting Lisbon.
content: Mikel Arteta has urged Arsenal's players not to panic as they aim to get their season back on track against Sporting Lisbon.

zh.title: 阿尔特塔在葡萄牙体育四分之一决赛前呼吁保持冷静
zh.summary: 米克尔·阿尔特塔敦促阿森纳球员不要惊慌失措，因为他们的目标是在与葡萄牙体育队的比赛中重振赛季。

title: McKennie equals career best with goal in Juve win
summary: United States midfielder Weston McKennie scored for Juventus in a 2-0 win over Genoa Monday and was named man of the match.
content: United States midfielder Weston McKennie scored for Juventus in a 2-0 win over Genoa Monday and was named man of the match.

zh.title: 麦肯尼在尤文胜利中打进职业生涯最高进球数
zh.summary: 美国中场韦斯顿·麦肯尼周一在尤文图斯2-0击败热那亚的比赛中进球，被评为全场最佳。

title: Kane available for Bayern in first leg with Madrid
summary: Bayern Munich striker Harry Kane practiced on Monday and is expected to be available against Real Madrid in their Champions League quarterfinal on Tuesday.
content: Bayern Munich striker Harry Kane practiced on Monday and is expected to be available against Real Madrid in their Champions League quarterfinal on Tuesday.

zh.title: 凯恩在与马德里的首回合比赛中可能为拜仁出战
zh.summary: 拜仁慕尼黑前锋哈里·凯恩在周一进行了训练，预计将在周二的欧冠四分之一决赛中对阵皇家马德里时出场。
